title: Add Waterworks Stunt Show, Dog Show, and Halfway to Horror Nights to Shows Section

requirements.text: Add a 'Waterworks Stunt Show' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Waterworks Stunt Show', a description highlighting jet skis, fire, blood-pumping action, and choreographed stunt fighting combat, a 'Coming 2027' year tag, and mark it as a non-haunt-season show.

quotes: Waterworks stunt show it's a water stunt show with jet skis and fire and blood and fighting

acceptanceCriteria: Waterworks Stunt Show entry appears in the shows content array
Description mentions jet skis, fire, stunt fighting/combat choreography
Show card renders in the Shows section on the home page

requirements.text: Add a 'Dog Show' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Dog Show', a fun family-friendly description emphasizing interactive entertainment for the whole family, performing dogs, and a meet & greet / petting experience after the show, and a 'Coming 2029' year tag.

quotes: fun and interactive show for whole family with dogs and u can pet them after show

acceptanceCriteria: Dog Show entry appears in the shows content array
Description mentions family-friendly, interactive, performing dogs, and post-show petting/meet & greet
Show card renders in the Shows section on the home page

requirements.text: Add a 'Halfway to Horror Nights' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Halfway to Horror Nights', a description dedicated to the Horror Nights origin story — covering how the event came about, a showcase of masks used throughout the event's history, and its annual May timing.

quotes: halfway to horror nights will be a show dedicated to horror nights In may will show all masks and how we came about this event

acceptanceCriteria: Halfway to Horror Nights entry appears in the shows content array
Description references Horror Nights origin story, masks showcase, and annual May timing
Show card renders in the Shows section on the home page

requirements.text: Register the AI-generated jet ski banner image for Waterworks Stunt Show and the AI-generated atmospheric story banner image for Halfway to Horror Nights in frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts, mapping each show name to its corresponding asset path under frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: AI image of jet skis for this show
halfway should be AI generated image as well of a story

acceptanceCriteria: generatedImages.ts contains a key for 'Waterworks Stunt Show' pointing to its jet ski banner asset
generatedImages.ts contains a key for 'Halfway to Horror Nights' pointing to its atmospheric banner asset
ShowsSection correctly reads and renders both images on their respective show cards

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSection.tsx to display the AI-generated banner images for Waterworks Stunt Show and Halfway to Horror Nights on their respective show cards, using the generatedImages map. Dog Show card should render without a custom generated image (use a placeholder or omit the image gracefully if no image is mapped).
acceptanceCriteria: Waterworks Stunt Show card displays the jet ski banner image
Halfway to Horror Nights card displays the atmospheric story banner image
Dog Show card renders without error even if no image is mapped
All three new show cards are visible in the Shows section

constraints: Do not alter existing show entries in shows.ts
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Generated images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ — not routed through the backend
nonGoals: Creating separate detail pages for the new shows (cards in the Shows section are sufficient)
Adding audition forms specific to any of these shows
Backend schema changes — no new data types or canister endpoints needed
Checkout or ticketing functionality for these shows

required: Dramatic action scene of jet skis racing on water with massive fire explosions, water spray, and intense stunt fighting silhouettes on the water — vivid oranges, reds, and neon reflections on dark water (waterworks-stunt-show-banner.dim_1200x500.png)

Atmospheric horror story illustration with dramatic fog, spotlights illuminating an array of terrifying masks mounted on a dark wall, blood-red and deep shadow tones evoking mystery and dread (halfway-to-horror-nights-banner.dim_1200x500.png)
